topic: Words appear in the fog on my mirror after every shower, in a child's handwriting.
title: Words Appeared In My Mirror Fog | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: After every shower, words appeared in the fog of my mirror.
scenes.image_prompt: A steamed bathroom mirror with faint letter shapes emerging in the condensation, dim warm light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It was my bathroom, in a house I bought last spring.
scenes.image_prompt: A modest bathroom with an old framed mirror above a porcelain sink, evening light through a small window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Hot shower. Thick steam. Then the mirror would fog white.
scenes.image_prompt: Steam rising past a fogged mirror in a tiled bathroom, blurred reflection, low warm light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night the fog held three uneven letters. A child's hand.
scenes.image_prompt: A foggy mirror with crooked childlike letters drawn in the condensation, dripping streaks, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I wiped it clean and backed away.
scenes.image_prompt: A hand-smeared streak across a foggy mirror, droplets running down, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Next night, more words. Help me find my shoe.
scenes.image_prompt: Childlike writing in mirror fog spelling out shaky words, steam curling, dim bathroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I photographed the glass before every shower. Always wiped clean.
scenes.image_prompt: A phone held up to a clear bathroom mirror taking a photo, reflection of a dim room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the writing returned, lower each time, as if growing smaller.
scenes.image_prompt: Faint child handwriting appearing near the bottom edge of a fogged mirror, condensation streaks, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I stopped showering at home. Used the gym for a week.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty dry bathroom with a clean mirror, dust on the sink, gray daylight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: When I returned, the dry mirror already held the words.
scenes.image_prompt: A completely dry bathroom mirror with childlike letters visible in the surface, no steam, cold light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I covered it with a sheet and slept in another room.
scenes.image_prompt: A bathroom mirror draped with a white sheet, faint outline beneath, dim hallway light spilling in, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The contractor said a child died in that bathroom long ago.
scenes.image_prompt: An old vintage photo of a small bathroom resting on a dusty shelf, faded edges, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
